results.rendered_html: matsya—purāṇa n. ‘f˚-Purāṇas’, N. of one of the 18 Purāṇas (so called as communicated by Viṣṇu in the form of a fish to the 7th Manu; cf. matsyāvatāra and  IW. 512 ).
